self_service.load_error: Error loading your details. Please try again later.
self_service.update_success_desc: Your details have been updated successfully.
self_service.update_error_desc: An error occurred. Please try again.

application.welcome_message: You are logged in as an applicant. You can now submit your membership application.

application_form.edit_desc: You can edit your details and resubmit for review
application_form.welcome_desc: With this form you can apply for membership of H-DCN (Harley-Davidson Club Netherlands).
application_form.disclaimer_text: By accepting membership you declare that participation in activities, whether or not organised by or on behalf of the H-DCN board, is entirely at your own risk and expense. Neither the H-DCN board, nor its individual board members or commissioners accept any liability for damage in any form, direct or indirect, resulting from activities by or on behalf of H-DCN.
application_form.signatory_text_1: The undersigned declares the above to have been completed truthfully and to abide by the Articles of Association and the Internal Regulations of H-DCN (available for inspection on the website
application_form.signatory_text_1_suffix: , and/or at the regional or general secretariat).
application_form.signatory_text_2: The undersigned hereby authorises H-DCN to collect the annual membership fee by direct debit from his or her bank account, until written cancellation, whereby the deadline of 1 November for the coming year must be observed.
application_form.submit_confirm_text: By clicking "Register", you confirm that the information provided is correct.
application_form.save_confirm_text: By clicking "Save Changes", your application will be resubmitted for review.
application_form.updated_desc: Your changes have been saved and will be reviewed again.
application_form.submitted_desc: Your application has been submitted successfully and will be reviewed.
application_form.submit_error_desc: An error occurred. Please try again.

new_application.check_error: An error occurred while checking your data.
new_application.page_subtitle: Welcome to the Harley-Davidson Club Netherlands
new_application.info_desc: To become a member of H-DCN you must first log in or create an account. After logging in you can submit your membership application.
new_application.login_prompt: Already have an account? Log in to submit your application.
new_application.benefit_events: Access to all H-DCN events and rides
new_application.benefit_webshop: Access to the webshop with exclusive products

submitted.title: Application Successfully Submitted!
submitted.subtitle: Thank you for your interest in H-DCN membership
submitted.received_desc: Your membership application is now being reviewed by our administration.
submitted.step_review_desc: Your application will be reviewed by the regional administration
submitted.step_confirmation_desc: You will receive an email with the result within 5-10 working days
submitted.step_approval_desc: Upon approval you will receive your member number and access to all facilities
submitted.tip_contact: For questions, contact your regional department
submitted.tip_privacy: Your data will be treated confidentially in accordance with our privacy statement
submitted.phone_desc: See contact details on the website per region
submitted.action_prompt: You can now explore the website or log out

no_member.title: No member data found
no_member.message: You are not yet a member of H-DCN.
no_member.apply_link: Click here to become a member
